sources.note: PRIMARY, 2026-07-03. The Wood River drone + machine-learning counting pilot: 8:30 launch, hand-labeling at the line, several thousand images needed, not yet tested against tower counts, over 70 years / since 1955 of hand counting.
Independent second source: Wood River sockeye escapement goal 700,000 to 2,800,000; Bristol Bay = largest commercial sockeye region in the world.
2026 total Bristol Bay run forecast 45.32 million sockeye.
UW Fisheries Research Institute station at Aleknagik (Wood River system) since 1946 to 1947.
